objective: Wire Slice B (Hook Wiring) of Epic #638: rewrite hooks/check-errors.sh as a 3-attempt PostToolUse fail-fast gate using fail_fast_state.py, add PostToolUse["*"] to .claude/settings.json with HOME-anchored absolute paths, update hooks/backlog-check.sh to enforce PROGRESS.md backlog-first rule via backlog_match.py, and commit scripts/overlord/backlog_match.py + scripts/overlord/fail_fast_state.py.
scope_boundary: hooks/check-errors.sh: rewrite as 3-attempt PostToolUse fail-fast gate using fail_fast_state.py record + check subcommands; block after 3 recurrences.
.claude/settings.json: add PostToolUse["*"] hook with HOME-anchored absolute path to hooks/check-errors.sh; remove all git rev-parse / PWD path resolution.
hooks/backlog-check.sh: extend to enforce backlog-first against docs/PROGRESS.md via backlog_match.py.
scripts/overlord/backlog_match.py: commit the fully-implemented untracked file.
scripts/overlord/fail_fast_state.py: commit the fully-implemented untracked file.
out_of_scope: Any changes to hooks/code-write-gate.sh or hooks/schema-guard.sh.
research_summary: PDCAR at docs/plans/issue-385-policy-hook-ci-hardening-pdcar.md (Slice 2) documents all four Slice B work items. Current .claude/settings.json has no PostToolUse hook. hooks/check-errors.sh (97 lines) is a doc-validation script, not a fail-fast gate. scripts/overlord/backlog_match.py and scripts/overlord/fail_fast_state.py are fully implemented and untracked. STANDARDS.md lines 14-35 mandate PostToolUse * and HOME-anchored paths.

sprints.name: Hook wiring and fail-fast gate
sprints.goal: Deliver all four Slice B changes: rewrite check-errors.sh as a 3-attempt fail-fast gate, wire PostToolUse["*"] in settings.json, extend backlog-check.sh to enforce PROGRESS.md backlog-first via backlog_match.py, and commit the two untracked overlord helper scripts.
tasks: Rewrite hooks/check-errors.sh as 3-attempt PostToolUse fail-fast gate using fail_fast_state.py.
Update .claude/settings.json: add PostToolUse block with matcher ["*"] pointing to hooks/check-errors.sh via HOME-anchored path.
Update hooks/backlog-check.sh: extract branch issue number, call backlog_match.py; exit 1 with actionable error when no open entry found.
acceptance_criteria: .claude/settings.json contains PostToolUse["*"] block with HOME-anchored path to hooks/check-errors.sh; no git rev-parse or PWD in hooks section.
hooks/check-errors.sh exits 1 when fail_fast_state.py check reports >= 2 recurrences; exits 0 on first occurrence; exits 0 when fail_fast_state.py absent.
hooks/backlog-check.sh exits 1 when branch issue number has no open entry in PROGRESS.md or OVERLORD_BACKLOG.md.
scripts/overlord/backlog_match.py is committed and not untracked.
scripts/overlord/fail_fast_state.py is committed and not untracked.

specialist_reviews.focus: hook wiring correctness and fail-fast gate logic
specialist_reviews.summary: Cross-family review confirmed the four Slice B items are scoped correctly. fail_fast_state.py RECURRENCE_THRESHOLD=2, fail-open on infrastructure errors, and HOME-anchored path pattern all satisfy STANDARDS.md requirements.

alternate_model_review.summary: gpt-5.3-codex-spark reviewed the four Slice B work items against STANDARDS.md. PostToolUse ["*"] matcher is correct; fail_fast_state.py 3-attempt gate with fail-open on infrastructure error matches documented intent; backlog_match.py dual-source search correctly implements backlog-first enforcement; HOME-anchored absolute paths are correct for this single-operator governance repo.

execution_handoff.approved_scope_summary: Authorized to modify .claude/settings.json, hooks/check-errors.sh, hooks/backlog-check.sh, and commit scripts/overlord/backlog_match.py and scripts/overlord/fail_fast_state.py only.
execution_handoff.next_execution_step: Rewrite hooks/check-errors.sh, add PostToolUse["*"] to .claude/settings.json, extend hooks/backlog-check.sh, commit the two untracked overlord scripts.
handoff_acceptance_criteria: AC1: .claude/settings.json contains PostToolUse["*"] block with HOME-anchored path.
AC2: hooks/check-errors.sh is a 3-attempt fail-fast gate using fail_fast_state.py.
AC3: hooks/backlog-check.sh enforces backlog-first via backlog_match.py.

material_deviation_rules: Any edit to .github/workflows/ is a material deviation CI changes belong to Slice C (#641).
Any edit to hooks/code-write-gate.sh or hooks/schema-guard.sh is a material deviation.
Using git rev-parse or PWD in any hook command is a material deviation HOME-anchored absolute paths are mandatory.
Hardcoding PostToolUse matcher to a specific tool is a material deviation.
